primary_heading.name: Oswald
primary_heading.usage: Page Titles, Case Names, Level Headers

secondary_heading.name: JetBrains Mono
secondary_heading.usage: Subheaders, Data Labels, Terminal Text, Evidence Logs

body.name: Inter
body.usage: Long form text, UI elements, Buttons, Inputs

colors.theme_strategy: Dark Mode Only (Primary). 'Paper Mode' used sparingly for actual case files within the UI.

spacing.grid_strategy: Bento Grid / Tetris Grid - Asymmetrical and dense.

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border-zinc-800. Sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm max).
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] for active elements. 'Glow' effects for terminal interactions.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used sparingly. bg-zinc-950/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/5 for headers.

textures.grain: Overlay noise texture on the entire viewport (opacity 3-5%).
textures.scanlines: Subtle repeating linear gradient on 'Terminal' or 'Video' components.

animations.redacted: bg-black text-black hover:text-white hover:bg-transparent transition-colors cursor-help select-none

dashboard.grid: grid-cols-12 gap-4. Widgets span 3, 4, or 6 columns. Dense packing.

case_file.visuals: Looks like physical physical files on a digital desk or a high-tech sleek database.

landing.hero_style: Full screen immersive image with heavy vignette and overlay text.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest font-bold text-sm h-10 px-8
buttons.destructive: bg-red-900/20 text-red-500 border border-red-900/50 hover:bg-red-900/40 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-xs h-8 px-4
buttons.ghost: text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-zinc-900 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-xs

cards.style: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800 hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors rounded-none p-6
cards.header: border-b border-zinc-800 pb-4 mb-4 flex justify-between items-center

inputs.style: bg-black border border-zinc-800 focus:border-white/50 rounded-none text-zinc-300 placeholder:text-zinc-700 font-mono text-sm h-10

modals.style: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-700 shadow-2xl rounded-none w-full max-w-2xl

general: Implement the 'Anti-AI' look: No soft gradients, no centered layouts, no 'friendly' rounded corners. Everything must be sharp, deliberate, and official.
Use the 'Redacted' effect for spoilers or locked content.
Ensure all key interactions have sound feedback (implied visual feedback like borders lighting up).
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Oswald' or 'JetBrains Mono'.
For the 'Case Board', use a drag-and-drop library or a CSS Grid layout that feels cluttered yet organized.
Strict adherence to Contrast Ratios: Text must be readable against the dark background.

file_structure.styles: Use tailwind classes for 99% of styling. Use custom CSS only for complex animations.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; }.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
